name: Euchre
description: Four-player team Euchre with neon table drama, slot-machine popups, and explosive trick celebrations.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Four-player Euchre. Seats 0/2 are Team A, 1/3 Team B. Deck is 9 through A. First team to 10 points wins.

HAND FLOW
Order-up round: players may pass or order the upcard suit as trump; dealer discards if ordered. Call round: players may pass or call any non-turned-down suit; stuck dealer must call. Play: five tricks, following effective suit when possible.

CARD RULES
In trump, the trump jack is right bower; the same-color jack is left bower and counts as trump. Highest card of led suit wins unless trump is played.

SCORING
Maker team scores 1 for 3-4 tricks, 2 for all 5, 4 for a lone sweep. Defenders score 2 for euchre.
